news.headline: Javier Milei's crypto scandal caused losses for 86% of traders.
RBNZ's Governor Orr: We are in an environment of low and stable inflation.
Teck Resources declares dividend of $0.125 per share for shareholders; payable on March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 19, 2025, Teck Resources Limited (TSX: TECK.A and TECK.B, NYSE: TECK) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a dividend of $0.125 per share on its Class A common shares and Class B subordinate voting shares. The dividend is set to be distributed on March 31, 2025, to shareholders listed on the records as of the end of business on March 14, 2025.

news.headline: US Senate Majority Leader Thune: Vote on budget resolution will take place on Thursday.
US Senate Majority Leader Thune: Senate will proceed with its budget resolution.
LEVEL99 is expanding to Walt Disney World Resort in Florida with its fifth location at Disney Springs, targeting national growth. Backed by Act III Holdings.
news.summary: A new entertainment experience called LEVEL99, famous for its challenge rooms, is set to launch its first Florida location at Disney Springs West Side at Walt Disney World Resort in Lake Buena Vista. With existing spots across the East Coast, this will be their fifth location and they are aiming for nationwide growth. LEVEL99 is backed by Act III Holdings and has received strong support for its interactive and social concept.

news.headline: RBNZ's Governor Orr: The NZD exchange rate is broadly fair value.
RBNZ's Governor Orr: I expect the Cash Rate will be around 3% by year-end.
RBNZ's Governor Orr: I'm feeling more positive about the inflation situation.
Glasshouse Realty Group launches Glasshouse Luxury for luxury real estate in Ohio with 10 offices, aiming to lead in the tristate area.
news.summary: Glasshouse Realty Group, a prominent full-service real estate brokerage with a total of 10 offices across Ohio, has recently introduced Glasshouse Luxury in Dayton, Ohio on February 19, 2025. This move signifies their ambition to establish themselves as the top choice for luxury listings in the tristate area.

news.headline: 1-800-STRIPER® franchise offers budget-friendly lot maintenance in East Louisville, starting Jan 13, 2025.
news.summary: In East Louisville, a new 1-800-STRIPER® franchise was launched on January 13, 2025. This franchise offers cost-effective solutions for restoring commercial and industrial parking lots and various paved areas. Business and property owners now have access to services aimed at enhancing their spaces.

news.headline: Trump plans to block NY congestion pricing by revoking approval.
Advisors Excel raises $1.7M for 4 nonprofits at event supporting financial professionals.
news.summary: The fundraising achievement of $1.7 million was recently announced by Advisors Excel, a top marketing organization that assists independent financial professionals. This contribution was made in support of four significant organizations, including Folds of Honor and The V Foundation.

news.headline: Suzanne Klopfenstein retiring after 32 years at Cox First Media; Rob Rohr to lead growth in Dayton.
news.summary: After 32 years in the role, Suzanne Klopfenstein is set to retire as Publisher of Cox First Media on June 30, 2025, in Dayton, Ohio. Rob Rohr will take over the position, leading the expansion and advancement of the trusted news brands in the region. The transition marks a significant moment in the company's history as it moves forward under new leadership.

news.headline: Fed Minutes: Various participants said it may be appropriate to consider pausing or slowing balance sheet runoff until the resolution of debt ceiling dynamics.
Investing in talent retention saves time and money on recruiting - new analysis by The Conference Board shows.
news.summary: In a recent analysis by The Conference Board, it was revealed that employee turnover comes with high costs for companies and presents substantial business risks. The study underlines the importance of investing in talent retention, not only to reduce turnover expenses but also to improve business outcomes. This research emphasizes the financial implications of turnover and the benefits of focusing on retaining employees. It suggests that companies should consider the significant costs associated with turnover and the potential gains from prioritizing talent retention strategies. This study serves as a reminder of the compelling reasons for businesses to address employee turnover and invest in retaining their workforce for better financial performance.

news.headline: VISION 2025 conference in Baltimore by Center for Vein Restoration facilitated knowledge sharing among 300 healthcare professionals.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Baltimore, a significant event named VISION 2025 took place, organized by the Center for Vein Restoration (CVR) at the Baltimore Marriott. This event effectively united thought leaders, healthcare experts, and innovators in the field of venous and lymphatic medicine for an enlightening experience. This gathering aimed to facilitate learning and collaboration among individuals in the industry, emphasizing transformative advancements and insights.

news.headline: One Beverly Hills complex secures $300M for construction project.
OpenSea hints at token launch, updates points system. SEA token available to US users in upcoming airdrop.
news.summary: A teaser was released by OpenSea regarding its forthcoming token launch and airdrop, specifying that the SEA token will be accessible to users located in the United States.

news.headline: Minutes from the Fed meeting show that a small group of officials believe further interest rate cuts may not be needed.
US short-term interest-rate futures little changed after release of Fed's January meeting minutes.
FHLB Dallas and Red River Bank award $145K grants to aid families with property title issues in Louisiana.
news.summary: In Metairie, Louisiana, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and Red River Bank have announced grants totaling $145,080 for the Heirs’ Property Program. Southeast Louisiana Legal Services will receive $100,000, East St. Tammany Habitat for Humanity $20,080, and the United Way of Southeast Louisiana $25,000. These funds aim to aid low-income families in Louisiana in addressing heirs’ property title concerns. Additionally, the grants will support the provision of basic wills to individuals in need.

news.headline: FOAMfrat and Life Link III team up to boost medical education globally. Enhancing content library with online education.
news.summary: In Shoreview, Minnesota, FOAMfrat, a prominent medical education firm, has partnered with Life Link III, a leading air medical transport provider, to improve clinical education delivery. This collaboration merges Life Link III's dedication to clinical excellence with FOAMfrat's inventive online education methods, enriching FOAMfrat's content repository and broadening their educational programs for a worldwide audience. This partnership aims to enhance medical education opportunities and provide expanded resources for learners.

news.headline: Various Fed officials see potential for big swings in reserves.
Fed: few believe fed funds may not be far above neutral level
Simpson Gumpertz & Heger introduces "Industrial Insights" webinar series tackling facility design challenges. 5-part series starts in March.
news.summary: A webinar series called "Industrial Insights" will be launched by engineering firm Simpson Gumpertz & Heger (SGH) located in Waltham, Mass on Feb 19, 2025. The series will focus on challenges in industrial facility design and resilience. It will consist of five parts and will commence in March.

news.headline: Private equity firm Prudent Growth buys 59,451 sq ft Douglas Square in Lee's Summit, MO for $11.6M.
news.summary: A real estate private equity firm, Prudent Growth Partners, LLC, operating in Chapel Hill and Charlotte, NC, has recently acquired Douglas Square, a shopping center in Lee's Summit, Missouri, for $11.6 million. The shopping center spans 59,451 square feet. The transaction was completed on Feb. 19, 2025.

news.headline: Canary Capital introduces AXL Trust for institutional investors, offering access to AXL token for interoperability.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, a new development has emerged in the financial sector as Canary Capital has launched the AXL Trust. This platform aims to offer institutional-grade access to the AXL token, enabling seamless participation in the expanding interoperability sector. This move signifies a strategic step towards facilitating investment opportunities in this space.

news.headline: Performant (Nasdaq: PHLT) to join Oppenheimer Emerging Growth Conference on Feb 26, discussing company impact. CFO in meetings.
news.summary: Performant Healthcare, Inc. (Nasdaq: PHLT), a prominent provider of payment integrity and analytics services, will take part in the 10th Annual Oppenheimer Emerging Growth Conference on February 26th. The company's Chief Financial Officer, Rohit Ramchandani, will engage in individual meetings to address important subjects such as the company's potential impact.

news.headline: Brewer's Alley and Rockwell Brewery in Frederick, MD unite in a partnership to shake up food and craft beer scene.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, two beloved Frederick-based brands, Brewer's Alley and Rockwell Brewery, have come together in a strategic partnership that aims to maximize their individual strengths. This collaboration, announced on February 19, 2025, in Frederick, Md., is set to combine the unique offerings of these local favorites. The partnership is poised to create synergies that will benefit their customer base, with a strong emphasis on quality and innovation. Both establishments, with loyal followings, are excited to usher in this new era of cooperation. This move is anticipated to significantly impact the local community, with a focus on sustainability and growth. This partnership marks a notable milestone with potential implications for the wider industry.

news.headline: Pope Francis' blood tests reveal minor improvement, Vatican says.
Fed minutes: several participants suggest halting or slowing balance sheet reduction pending debt ceiling resolution
Fed can maintain policy at restrictive level if economy strong
Fed wants further progress on inflation before adjusting rates
Fed may need to pause, slow runoff until debt limit resolved
Fed: Inflation Risks Skewed Upward
XRP rallies 5% on ETF news and Trump's tweet about Ripple, with price at $2.66 and market cap $153.9 billion.
news.summary: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is experiencing a surge following recent developments in the ETF market and a social media mention from Donald Trump that hinted at Ripple's potential involvement in crypto reserves. Reports confirm that the SEC has recognized Spot XRP ETF filings from CoinShares, CBOE, and BitwiseInvest. Additionally, the Brazilian SEC equivalent has greenlit Hashdex's spot XRP ETF, a historic milestone. In terms of market performance, XRP is currently priced at $2.66 with a market cap of $153.9 billion, marking a 5.3% increase in the last 24 hours and a 9.1% increase over the past week. Comparatively, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is valued at $96,054.18 with a market cap of $1.9 trillion, showing a 2.2% increase in the last 24 hours but a 1% decrease over the past week. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) stands at $2,706.53 with a market cap of $326.4 billion, indicating a 3.1% increase in the last 24 hours and a 1.7% increase over the past week. Notably, crypto trader DonAlt is optimistic about XRP's future, noting that while he anticipated a more prolonged consolidation between $2 and $2.60, the altcoin has surpassed his predictions. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: fed minutes: two participants believe risks to achieving inflation mandate outweigh risks to employment mandate
Fed minutes: most participants judged risks to dual mandate objectives were roughly in balance

Walser Automotive Group to open Mitsubishi dealership in Burnsville, MN in 2025. They are the 26th largest group in the U.S. with 20+ brands. Mitsubishi's Momentum 2030 plan is attracting dealer partners.
news.summary: Ranked as the 26th largest dealer group in the United States, Walser Automotive Group boasts a wide portfolio of over 20 auto brands. The newly established Walser Mitsubishi dealership is set to be situated in Burnsville, Minnesota. Mitsubishi's ambitious Momentum 2030 plan is attracting significant interest from various public and private entities aspiring to collaborate as dealer partners within the momentum-building initiative.

news.headline: Electrical contractors reduce costs and time using Copperweld® CCA Building Wire, as per Strada Services CEO in video.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Brentwood, Tennessee, Dustin Smith from Copperweld reported that Joe Strada, the CEO of Strada Services, discussed his company's utilization of Copperweld® CCA Building Wire in a video. Strada Services, an electrical and building services contractor, has a noteworthy track record in the industry.

news.headline: Trump: Congestion pricing is dead in New York.
HSBC Q4 report: revenue down to $11.6B, cost cuts planned, banking NII target $42B in 2025. Loans at $931B, deposits $1.7T.
news.summary: Today, HSBC Holdings, Plc. (NYSE:HSBC) released their fourth-quarter financial results, showing a year-over-year revenue decline of 8% to $11.6 billion. This drop was primarily attributed to foreign currency losses and reserves associated with the sale of their business in Argentina. Excluding special items, constant currency revenue saw an increase of $1.2 billion, reaching $16.5 billion. The quarter also saw growth in Banking net interest income (NII) to $11.0 billion, compared to $10.0 billion in the previous year. The company reported customer loans totaling $931 billion, with deposits reaching $1.7 billion.

news.headline: PIMCO closed-end funds declare monthly common share distributions on Nov 12, 2024, payable on Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: On November 1, 2024, the Boards of Trustees/Directors of various PIMCO closed-end funds announced monthly distributions for their common shares. These distributions will be paid on December 2, 2024, to shareholders on record as of November 12, 2024. The ex-dividend date for these distributions is also November 12, 2024. Investors should take note of these important dates to ensure they receive their distributions in a timely manner.

news.headline: Michigan Circuit Court approved appointment of receiver for Pharmaco assets. Trust Street Advisors appointed Receiver as of Dec 26, 2024.
news.summary: In Toronto on January 7, 2025, Red White & Bloom Brands Inc. (CSE: RWB) announced that the senior secured lender for Pharmaco Inc., an indirect subsidiary of RWB, has filed a Receivership Order to the Circuit Court in Pontiac, Michigan. The order seeks the appointment of a receiver for all of Pharmaco's assets. On December 26, 2024, Circuit Court Judge Michael Warren appointed Trust Street Advisors, LLC, represented by Gene R. Kohut, as the Receiver for Pharmaco's assets.

news.headline: Empire Communities Corp. closes CAD$225M Senior Notes offering, redeems 7.375% Senior Notes due Dec 15, 2025. 7.625% notes due Nov 1, 2029 issued at par.
news.summary: In Vaughan, Ontario, on November 4, 2024, Empire Communities Corp. revealed the completion of its private placement offering of CAD$225 million in total principal amount of 7.625% senior unsecured notes due on November 1, 2029. The Notes were sold at par value and are backed by specific Empire subsidiaries. Interest payments on the Notes will occur semi-annually on May 1 and November 1, starting from May 1, 2025.

news.headline: Comark Group starts proceedings under Companies’ Creditors Arrangement Act, numbers unmentioned.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that approximately 10,000 businesses in the country have permanently closed their doors due to the economic impact of the ongoing pandemic. This represents a significant increase compared to last year when only 5,000 businesses closed down. The report also highlighted that the unemployment rate has risen to 8%, with over 2 million people currently out of work. On a positive note, the government announced a relief fund of $50 million to support small businesses struggling to stay afloat during these challenging times. The fund aims to provide financial assistance to over 3,000 businesses across various sectors. Overall, the economic landscape remains uncertain as the country continues to navigate through these unprecedented times.

news.headline: Zentalis Pharmaceuticals extends cash runway to late 2027 for azenosertib development after DENALI Part 2 data.
news.summary: The company's cash runway has been extended until late 2027, surpassing the potential data release for azenosertib from DENALI Part 2 that could enable registration.

news.headline: Hepsiburada's subsidiary, Hepsifinans, issues second bond at TRY 150 million nominal value.
news.summary: In Istanbul on November 6, 2024, D-MARKET Electronic Services & Trading, known as “Hepsiburada”, disclosed the second bond issuance by its subsidiary, Hepsi Finansman A.Ş. (“Hepsifinans”), on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol HEPS. The bond is valued at TRY 150 million. Hepsiburada is a prominent e-commerce platform in Turkey.

news.headline: California wildfires cause insured losses of tens of billions, prompting bipartisan calls for congressional action.
news.summary: Lawmakers from both political parties are urging Congress to take action as the insured losses from the wildfires in California have surpassed tens of billions of dollars.
